name: auto-git-copilot
displayName: AutoGit-AI — Auto Commit, Push & Secret Scan
description: Auto-commit and push with AI-generated commit messages (GitHub Copilot), plus built-in secret scanning that blocks API keys, tokens, and passwords before they leave your machine.

autoGitCopilot.enabled.description: Enable automatic git operations when files change

autoGitCopilot.delayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before triggering git operations after a file change (1000-30000ms)

autoGitCopilot.autoPush.description: Push to the remote after each automatic commit. Disable to commit locally only.

autoGitCopilot.includeUntracked.description: Include untracked files in automatic commits

autoGitCopilot.useAI.description: Generate commit messages with the Copilot language model. When disabled (or unavailable), a descriptive fallback message is used.

autoGitCopilot.scanForSecrets.description: Scan the staged diff for credentials (API keys, tokens, private keys, hardcoded passwords) and block the commit when one is found. Strongly recommended when autoPush is enabled.

autoGitCopilot.secretScanIgnorePatterns.description: Regex patterns for secret-scan findings to ignore. Each pattern is tested against the matched text and against its 'file:line' location. You can also append 'autogit:allow-secret' in a comment on the flagged line.

autoGitCopilot.maxCommitMessageLength.description: Maximum length for commit messages (20-200 characters)

autoGitCopilot.protectedBranches.description: Branch names on which auto-commit is skipped (e.g. ["main", "master"])

enumDescriptions: Show all notifications, including successful commits
Only show warnings and errors (plus the occasional rating / what's-new notice — see enableRatingPrompt)
Never show popup notifications (status bar and logs only)
autoGitCopilot.notificationLevel.description: Which popup notifications to show. Security warnings from the secret scanner are always shown. The occasional rating prompt and what's-new notice are governed by enableRatingPrompt and are silenced only by "none". Full details are always written to the Auto Git output channel.

autoGitCopilot.excludePatterns.description: File patterns to exclude from auto-commit (glob patterns: * matches within a segment, ** across segments; patterns without / match at any depth)

autoGitCopilot.enableRatingPrompt.description: Occasionally invite you to rate AutoGit-AI on the Marketplace after many successful commits (at most 3 times, ever). Turn off to never be asked.

scripts.check: node --check extension.js && node --check lib/patterns.js && node --check lib/commitMessage.js && node --check lib/gitService.js && node --check lib/secretScanner.js && node --check lib/engagement.js
